modesty_register.value: STRICT (Saudi default — modest, no skin, no mixed-gender intimacy)

primary.value: Warm 21K/22K yellow gold — saturated, slightly orange-warm Gulf-gold tone (≈#D4A93A–#E0B43C), high specular sheen — is the hero metal. A secondary cool line exists: white-gold/diamond+CZ baguette (bright silver-white, ≈#E8EAEC) and natural pearl (warm off-white, ≈#F1E9DE). Maroon + cream are the brand's identity colours framing the metal.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Yellow 21K/22K gold dominates the product corpus: bead-and-wheat bangle+ring set DYTLFKEINgJ, geometric necklace DOeSKrEjG1B, coin-charm necklace DOeRr0jjKLc, f

primary.example: exact hex is RED until client confirms

background_tone.value: Two grounded modes: (1) STUDIO — seamless deep-maroon-to-cream gradient sweep, warm and unlit-edged, the gold/metal lifted off a creamy ivory display bust or surface against an oxblood backdrop. (2) EDITORIAL/ENVIRONMENTAL — burgundy silk drape, dark leather antique-book surfaces, or warm-tungsten Najdi-majlis interiors. Never cold white; never neutral grey. Tone is always warm, dim, gallery-luxe.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Studio gradient: DOeSKrEjG1B & DOeRr0jjKLc (gold on cream bust against maroon ground). Silk drape: DYEnXyZlGjO (burgundy satin). Leather-book surface: DYcSAkSlF

background_tone.example: exact value RED until client confirms

color_field_palette.value: Deep wine-maroon / oxblood burgundy (≈#5C1A26–#6B1F2E) as the dominant brand-owned field colour, with a warm brown Sadu/Najdi geometric tone (≈#8A6A3A) used only inside the woven border motif, and creamy ivory/parchment (≈#EDE2C8) as the partner light field. Gold (≈#C9A24B) appears as a typographic/accent colour, never as a flat field. STRICTLY brand-owned — no off-brand red/orange/blue color-blocking allowed.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: The deep maroon field recurs as the literal background across the brand's own graphic posts: DO8M6Z2jIZA (diamond-ring card on maroon with brown Sadu border), D

color_field_palette.example: exact value RED until client confirms

capture_character.value: Polished editorial luxury jewellery photography: warm directional key light with controlled soft falloff, high specular highlights that ride the gold's facets and beadwork, deep warm shadows (chiaroscuro) cut against maroon/leather grounds, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp macro detail on metalwork and stones, gallery/heirloom mood. On-model shots are soft-glam beauty crops (neck/decolletage, warm skin, muted earthy wardrobe). Subdued, refined, never flashy or cold-clinical.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Consistent warm chiaroscuro and high gold-specular across DYTLFKEINgJ (single warm key, deep maroon falloff, leather-book staging) and DYcSAkSlFb8/DYepoLCFhWG.

capture_character.example: exact value RED until client confirms

anti_attributes.value: no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

material_finish.value: polished 18–22k gold with true warm specular

material_texture.value: Strand of natural/freshwater pearls — soft satin-iridescent nacre with gentle directional sheen and subtle surface tooth (not glassy, not matte), each pearl catching a soft broad highlight rather than a hard specular point. Pendant is bright white gold + pavé/baguette diamonds: hard, cool, sparkling — a deliberate texture contrast against the warm soft pearl.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DXSDa2ZDEAg & DXSFYIWDBHI: graduated pearl strands (oval rice pearls and round pearls) with diamond-cluster drop pendants on white gold; pearl nacre sheen vs. d

dimensions.value: Princess-length strand ≈42–45cm; pearls ≈7–9mm each; pendant drop ≈35–40mm. Scale anchor: the human collarbone/decolletage — the strand sits at the base of the throat and the pendant falls roughly one hand-width below the hollow of the neck.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DXSDa2ZDEAg & DXSFYIWDBHI both shown on-model; strand length sits at collarbone, pearls read ~one fingernail-width, pendant ~thumb-length against the sternum.

companion_elements.value: World = bridal/formal-evening world. One hero companion only: a dark wardrobe surface (navy or black silk neckline) that lets the pearls and white-gold read — OR a single folded ivory silk swatch. ONE only; the dark neckline IS the contrast companion.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DXSDa2ZDEAg (navy V-neck) and DXSFYIWDBHI (black slip) both use a single dark wardrobe plane as the contrasting ground; no extra props. Brand wordmark placed bo

material_texture.value: Polished white gold (rhodium-bright silver-white, mirror specular on the band) set with channel/cluster baguette + round diamonds. The metal reads as a hard, cool, high-reflectance rigid substrate; the stones throw sharp pin-point fire and refractive sparkle, not soft glow. Surface is rigid and unbending, holds crisp edge highlights.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DO8M6Z2jIZA: open-shank leaf-spray ring of clustered baguette+round diamonds on bright white-gold band, '750' (18K) hallmark visible on the shank; bright cool m

dimensions.value: Adjustable open-shank ring, band ≈2mm; leaf cluster head ≈22–25mm tall. Scale anchor: a woman's ring finger (~16–17mm circumference) — the diamond spray rises about 1.5× the width of the finger it sits on.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DO8M6Z2jIZA shows an open C-shank adjustable ring; proportions read against the implied finger; hallmark stamp scale confirms a standard ring band width.

companion_elements.value: World = the diamond/bridal-luxe world. One hero companion only: a single antique leather presentation book or maroon ring box on a maroon Sadu-bordered ground. Restrain to ONE — no scattered petals or multiple props.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: Brand's own diamond cards stage on maroon + Sadu border (DO8M6Z2jIZA); leather-book staging is the brand's established prop world (DYcSAkSlFb8). Hashtags خاتم_ا

material_texture.value: Warm 21K yellow gold with a sand-cast / florentine textured surface on the square motifs (diffuse micro-sparkle, granular matte-bright) contrasted with smooth polished oval-link chain (bright continuous specular). The textured panels scatter light softly; the chain returns crisp highlights. Solid, supple chain that drapes; rigid geometric pendants.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DOeSKrEjG1B: textured open-square pendant motifs with dangling chain tassels on a polished cable chain, displayed on a cream bust; texture vs. polish contrast c

dimensions.value: Chain ≈45–50cm (matinee); central square pendant ≈28–32mm with a second drop + 3 short tassels below. Scale anchor: the neck/upper chest of a display bust — the pendant cluster spans roughly the width of two adult fingers and sits mid-sternum.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DOeSKrEjG1B shown on a cream display bust; chain length and pendant span read directly against the bust's neck-to-chest proportion.

companion_elements.value: World = studio jewellery-presentation world. One hero companion only: the creamy ivory display bust/neck-form against the maroon ground. The bust IS the single companion — add nothing else.

material_texture.value: Solid 21K/22K warm yellow gold: a high-polish wheat/herringbone-engraved central band flanked by twin rows of fine gold granulation (beadwork). The beads read as hard, rounded, individually specular spheres; the engraved center catches a continuous warm highlight streak. Rigid, weighty, heirloom-solid — never thin or hollow-looking.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DYTLFKEINgJ: hinged beaded-edge bangle with engraved wheat center + matching saddle ring, deep warm gold, each granule throwing its own highlight; staged on sta

dimensions.value: Bangle inner diameter ≈60mm (standard wrist); band width ≈10–12mm. Matching ring band ≈9–10mm wide. Scale anchor: a woman's wrist (~55–60mm) — the bangle is a snug oval cuff with safety-chain clasp; the ring is a bold statement band ~2/3 the bangle's width.

provenance.source: corpus_grounded: DYTLFKEINgJ shows a hinged cuff bangle with extension safety chain; band width reads against the ring beside it; sized to a typical adult female wrist.

companion_elements.value: World = heritage/heirloom legacy world ('Legacy of Gold · Since 1934'). One hero companion only: stacked antique leather-bound books (deep oxblood) as the staging plinth. Restrain to the books alone — no flowers, no extra metal.
